description:
A free, playful language-learning app for English speakers.

Lingo Lessons helps you practice Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Japanese, Korean, and Chinese with short lessons, guided units, review practice, and local progress tracking. It is built for quick daily sessions without accounts, ads, or paywalls.

FEATURES

8 Language Courses
Learn Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Japanese, Korean, and Chinese from English.

Guided Learn Path
Move through units and lessons with a clear progression path.

Interactive Exercises
Practice matching, selecting, typing, fill-in-the-blank, and word-bank exercises.

Audio Practice
Hear words and phrases during lessons so you can connect text with sound.

Mistake Review
Practice the items you missed and reinforce them over time.

Local Progress
Your streak, XP, hearts, course progress, and lesson state live on your device.

No ads. No paywalls. No account required.
promotionalText: Learn 8 languages with short, playful lessons. Free, local-first, no ads.
